# ToolsML - AI Tools Directory

## Purpose
ToolsML is a comprehensive directory featuring 1000+ curated AI tools across 200+ categories. We help users discover, compare, and choose the right AI solutions for their needs.

## Categories
- AI Writing & Content Generation
- Image Generation & Design
- Video Editing & Production
- Developer Tools & Code Assistants
- Chatbots & Conversational AI
- Machine Learning Platforms
- Audio & Music Generation
- Business & Productivity Tools
- Marketing & SEO Automation
- Document Processing & OCR
- Research & Data Analytics
- Creative & Design Tools

## Features
- Human-curated tool reviews
- Detailed pricing comparisons
- Feature breakdowns and specifications
- User ratings and reviews
- Advanced filtering and search
- Weekly updates with new tools
- Category-based browsing
- Tool comparison functionality

## Content
All tools in our directory include:
- Comprehensive descriptions
- Pricing models (Free, Freemium, Paid)
- Key features and capabilities
- User reviews and ratings
- Company information
- Use case examples
- Pros and cons analysis

## API
For developers interested in accessing our tool data, please contact us through our website.

## Contact
Website: https://toolsml.com
Submit a tool: https://toolsml.com/submit
Advertise: https://toolsml.com/advertise

## Updates
Last updated: October 2025
New tools added weekly
Review data refreshed daily
